languages.text: "Нет. И так уж вышло, что сейчас меня это совершенно не интересует". {n}С коротким щелчком Камилла перемещает бусину на четках.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Нет. И так уж вышло, что сейчас меня это совершенно не интересует". {n}С коротким щелчком Камилла перемещает бусину на четках.{/n}

languages.text: "I do not. And as it happens, I am perfectly uninterested in the question at present." {n}With a short click, Camilla moves a bead on the necklace in her hands.{/n}

languages.text: “我不知道。而且眼下，我碰巧对这个问题没什么兴趣。”{n}卡米拉轻轻一拨，手中的项链发出一声脆响。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not. And as it happens, I am perfectly uninterested in the question at present." {n}With a short click, Camilla moves a bead on the necklace in her hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我不知道。而且眼下，我碰巧对这个问题没什么兴趣。”{n}卡米拉轻轻一拨，手中的项链发出一声脆响。{/n}

languages.text: « Non, et il se trouve que cette question ne m'intéresse absolument pas à l'heure actuelle, » {n}déclare Camilla en faisant passer un grain de son chapelet entre ses doigts dans un petit cliquetis.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not. And as it happens, I am perfectly uninterested in the question at present." {n}With a short click, Camilla moves a bead on the necklace in her hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Non, et il se trouve que cette question ne m'intéresse absolument pas à l'heure actuelle, » {n}déclare Camilla en faisant passer un grain de son chapelet entre ses doigts dans un petit cliquetis.{/n}

languages.text: "Bilmiyorum. Doğrusu, şu anda bu soruyla hiç ilgilenmiyorum." {n}Camilla, kısa bir tıkırtıyla ellerindeki kolyenin bir boncuğunu hareket ettiriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not. And as it happens, I am perfectly uninterested in the question at present." {n}With a short click, Camilla moves a bead on the necklace in her hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bilmiyorum. Doğrusu, şu anda bu soruyla hiç ilgilenmiyorum." {n}Camilla, kısa bir tıkırtıyla ellerindeki kolyenin bir boncuğunu hareket ettiriyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Pues no. Y, sinceramente, no me interesa en absoluto la pregunta». {n}Con un breve clic, Camilla mueve una de las cuentas del collar que sujeta.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not. And as it happens, I am perfectly uninterested in the question at present." {n}With a short click, Camilla moves a bead on the necklace in her hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Pues no. Y, sinceramente, no me interesa en absoluto la pregunta». {n}Con un breve clic, Camilla mueve una de las cuentas del collar que sujeta.{/n}

languages.text: "Nein. Und tatsächlich interessiert mich die Frage im Moment auch nicht." {n}Mit einem kurzen Klicken verschiebt Camilla eine Perle der Halskette in ihren Händen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not. And as it happens, I am perfectly uninterested in the question at present." {n}With a short click, Camilla moves a bead on the necklace in her hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Nein. Und tatsächlich interessiert mich die Frage im Moment auch nicht." {n}Mit einem kurzen Klicken verschiebt Camilla eine Perle der Halskette in ihren Händen.{/n}

languages.text: 「私は興味がありません。そして、たまたまですが、私はこの質問には全く興味がありません。」{n}カミラは短いクリックで、手元のネックレスのビーズを動かした。{/n}
